title: dryopteris subspinulosa
intro: Dryopteris subspinulosa, also known as the Spiny Wood Fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and the Korean Peninsula. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Dryopteris subspinulosa include reducing pain and inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
